---
title: "UCNRS Sentinel Site Deployment Progress"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  cwd <- getwd()
  project_root <- if (basename(cwd) == "scripts") {
    normalizePath(file.path(cwd, ".."), mustWork = FALSE)
  } else {
    normalizePath(file.path(cwd, "projects", "2026-03_ssn-deployment"), mustWork = FALSE)
  }
  project_lib <- file.path(project_root, ".Rlib")
  if (dir.exists(project_lib)) {
    .libPaths(c(project_lib, .libPaths()))
  }
  library(sf)
  library(dplyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(tigris)
  library(rmapshaper)
  library(gridExtra)
  library(grid)
})

gpkg_path <- file.path(project_root, "data", "ucnrs_deployment.gpkg")
out_dir   <- file.path(project_root, "outputs", "maps")

if (!dir.exists(out_dir)) dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
if (!file.exists(gpkg_path)) stop("GeoPackage not found. Run 01_process.R first: ", gpkg_path)

deployment_sf <- st_read(gpkg_path, layer = "ucnrs_deployment", quiet = TRUE)

status_levels <- c(
  "Not yet visited",
  "Infrastructure set up",
  "Collecting data (1st round)",
  "Collecting data (2nd round)"
)

status_palette <- c(
  "Not yet visited"              = "#D9D9D9",
  "Infrastructure set up"        = "#F2C300",
  "Collecting data (1st round)" = "#74C476",
  "Collecting data (2nd round)"  = "#238B45"
)

# Ensure factor order is correct for legend
deployment_sf$status <- factor(deployment_sf$status, levels = status_levels, ordered = TRUE)

# California outline
options(tigris_use_cache = TRUE)
ca <- tigris::states(cb = TRUE, year = 2023, class = "sf") |>
  filter(NAME == "California") |>
  st_transform(st_crs(deployment_sf))

ca <- rmapshaper::ms_simplify(ca, keep = 0.08, keep_shapes = TRUE)
```

```{r helpers}
plot_map <- function(data_sf, title, subtitle = NULL, show_legend = FALSE) {
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_sf(data = ca, fill = "white", color = "#BFC5C8", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_sf(
      data = data_sf,
      aes(color = status),
      size = 2.2,
      alpha = 0.9
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values  = status_palette,
      limits  = status_levels,
      drop    = FALSE,
      name    = "Deployment Status"
    ) +
    coord_sf() +
    labs(title = title, subtitle = subtitle) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      panel.grid     = element_blank(),
      axis.title     = element_blank(),
      axis.text      = element_blank(),
      legend.position = if (show_legend) "right" else "none",
      legend.text    = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.title   = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
      plot.title     = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.1),
      plot.subtitle  = element_text(size = 13, hjust = 0.1, color = "#555555")
    )
  p
}

make_counts_table <- function(data_sf) {
  counts <- data_sf |>
    st_drop_geometry() |>
    count(status, .drop = FALSE) |>
    mutate(status = factor(status, levels = status_levels)) |>
    arrange(status)

  # Ensure all levels represented even at 0, in progression order
  all_levels <- data.frame(status = factor(status_levels, levels = status_levels))
  counts <- merge(all_levels, counts, by = "status", all.x = TRUE)
  counts$n[is.na(counts$n)] <- 0L
  counts$status <- factor(counts$status, levels = status_levels)
  counts[order(counts$status), ]
}

compose_panel <- function(data_sf, title, subtitle = NULL) {
  map_plot <- plot_map(data_sf, title, subtitle, show_legend = FALSE)
  counts   <- make_counts_table(data_sf)

  # Extract legend from a legend-bearing version of the plot
  legend_plot      <- plot_map(data_sf, "", show_legend = TRUE)
  legend_grob_full <- ggplotGrob(legend_plot)
  guide_idx        <- which(grepl("guide", legend_grob_full$layout$name))
  legend_grob      <- legend_grob_full$grobs[[guide_idx[1]]]

  counts_df <- data.frame(
    Status    = as.character(counts$status),
    `# Sites` = counts$n,
    check.names = FALSE
  )

  table_grob <- gridExtra::tableGrob(
    counts_df,
    rows  = NULL,
    theme = gridExtra::ttheme_minimal(
      core = list(
        fg_params = list(fontsize = 13),
        bg_params = list(fill = c("white", "#F5F5F5"))
      ),
      colhead = list(
        fg_params = list(fontsize = 13, fontface = "bold"),
        bg_params = list(fill = "#EFEFEF")
      ),
      padding = grid::unit(c(3, 3), "mm")
    )
  )

  right_panel <- gridExtra::arrangeGrob(
    legend_grob,
    table_grob,
    ncol    = 1,
    heights = c(1.5, 1)
  )

  gridExtra::arrangeGrob(
    map_plot,
    right_panel,
    ncol   = 2,
    widths = c(2.8, 2.2)
  )
}

save_map <- function(plot_obj, filename) {
  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(out_dir, filename),
    plot     = plot_obj,
    width    = 11,
    height   = 8.5,
    dpi      = 300
  )
}
```

## Deployment Progress Map

```{r map}
panel <- compose_panel(
  deployment_sf,
  title    = "2026 UCNRS Sentinel Site Deployment Progress",
  subtitle = "as of March 06, 2026"
)
save_map(panel, "ucnrs_deployment_progress.png")
grid::grid.draw(panel)
```
